name: Assembly Line Cycle Time Benchmarking
description: An automation engineer must benchmark the throughput of an automated pick-and-place assembly cell in CoppeliaSim to support a production approval review. Capture per-cycle timing data across at least 10 complete operation cycles and produce a timing analysis report characterizing cell performance. Save the per-cycle records to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/cycle_timing.csv and the aggregate throughput statistics to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/timing_report.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
